rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically and conceptually close: it develops a Bayesian CLV framework with budget-constrained optimization and joint timing/quantity modeling, while the citing paper also proposes a Bayesian CLV model with budget constraints in a new CPG context. The citing note explicitly says it “extends CLV research from relationship-marketing contexts into CPG,” which makes this 2007 CLV/CRM study a plausible foundational or comparison source rather than an incidental mention. Given this overlap, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
